title: BetterTotems
description: This Texture Pack Simply Gives The Totem A Transparent Green Outline, As Well As Making The Totem 50% Smaller In Size. Making CPvP Much Easier To Play.
body: This texture pack makes the totem less annoying by making it 50% smaller, reducing the totem pop particles by 75%, making the totem pop appear smaller and move down toward the hotbar instead of the crosshair region, adding a transparent green highlight, and adjusting the position in which the totem is displayed in the hand
